description_long: This is a large, industrial shipping container, painted in a mustard yellow color with visible corrugated steel sides for structural strength. The front face features double doors secured with multiple vertical locking bars and metal hinges, as well as printed black text and logos, including the prominent 'MSC' logo. The sides display additional printed information, such as the shipping company name and container identification numbers. The rear and one side are plain, with no visible openings or markings, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The container is constructed from heavy-duty metal, likely steel, and is designed to be weather-resistant and stackable for transport. Its robust build and standardized shape make it suitable for use in shipping yards, industrial zones, or as temporary storage in urban environments.
description: A large, yellow corrugated steel shipping container with double locking doors and printed black logos and text. It is robust, industrial, and designed for secure transport and storage.
description_view_0: The side view shows the corrugated yellow steel wall with the large black 'MSC' logo and vertical printed text.
description_view_1: The front view displays the double doors with multiple locking bars, hinges, and detailed printed information including logos and container numbers.
description_view_2: The opposite side view is plain, showing only the corrugated yellow steel with no visible markings or openings.
description_view_3: The rear view shows the end of the container, which is solid and unmarked, with corrugated steel panels.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: printed logo on side, container numbers and information on front doors
attribute_handles_or_grips: multiple vertical handles on front doors
